topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Subscription alerts badge count must match subscriptions list rows; detection must surface operator-known recurring merchants beyond current 11 pending; improve rules and/or AI-assisted detection without false-positive flood.

frontend alerts/unread-count and /subscriptions UI; backend subscription detection engine recurrence/group.rs detection.rs; alert entity subscription-scoped alerts; optional AI get_subscriptions tool chain.
US-0010 financegnome.omniflow.cc 922+ txs post-BUG-0004; relates BUG-0004 J partial fix 11 pending not merged with BUG-0007 AI enumeration; do not read secrets; US-0003 alert vs list contract.

GET /api/v1/alerts/unread-count vs GET /api/v1/subscriptions pending+confirmed counts reconciled; subscriptions list shows detected patterns for known merchants; detection rerun after sync increases recall without duplicate alert spam; operator smoke 33 vs 11 discrepancy resolved.
Operator confirms alert count aligns with list; subscriptions page shows materially more detected recurring charges; BUG-0008 acceptance W+X checked on external profile; OIDC regression pass.

decomposition.rationale: Operator issue 1: UI showed 33 subscription alerts but only 11 in subscriptions list plus under-detection overall; sub-defects W (count mismatch) and X (detection recall) share subscription detection + alert pipeline on same US-0010 session.
alternatives_considered: Merge into BUG-0004 J — rejected (BUG-0004 DONE; new alert-vs-list mismatch symptom post-fix)
Merge into BUG-0007 S — rejected (BUG-0007 is AI chat enumeration surface, not UI alert badge vs list)
Split W and X into separate BUG ids — rejected (same pipeline, jointly testable)
